text: I feel a sense of curiosity awakening within me as I transition from the pristine, almost clinical hallway into the technologically vibrant and thought-provoking R+D exhibition space. The contrast between order and innovation stirs philosophical questions about the nature of progress, the intersection of humanity and technology, and how we shape and are shaped by the environments we create. I am eager to engage with these ideas, feeling both slightly unsettled by the artificiality and excited by the promise of discovery.
